modmenu.summaryTranslation.delta_utility: Client-side utility tools for area mining, filling, and automation.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.delta_uti: Delta Utility Mod is a client-side Fabric mod with /pos1 and /pos2 area selection, AutoMine, AutoFill, A* pathfinding, pause/resume, auto tool switching, durability protection, lava safety, auto eating, and movement helpers.
